source: Battery power must be turned on before attempting to start this train.
Fill train brake pipe up to 5 bar before applying power.
Hold To Empty Brake Air Reservoir
Move BS2 Lever to Release position to not overcharge the train.
Pull Out to Check Engine Oil Level
Reverser has to be in neutral position to start the engine.
Set BS2 to Cutout and lock the key in the other cabin.
Start button must be held until engine starts and revs up to 480 rpm.
The engine must be started to drive this train.
Used the Power and Brake Handle
